examples: Production was generally in the hands of skilled individual artisans doing piecework under the tutelage of a master who was also the shop owner.
Civilization is to has the tutelage of people.
The simplicity of the table is intentional for purposes of tutelage.
Under Babar's tutelage the Punjab government is installing several small hydro and solar power plants.
Her father had ceased to exercise tutelage over her since his stroke seven years earlier.
